subject: vocabulary
title: Dictionary Terms
instruction: The words in column A are all related to dictionaries. Match the words to the correct meaning in column B.

options.A: a large amount of written material organised to show how language works
options.C: a word that means the same
options.D: a dictionary containing synonyms and antonyms
options.E: the sound and pronunciation of words
options.F: written in two different languages for translation purposes
options.H: a word that means the opposite
